## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Reddit's lifecycle email marketing strategy and explore opportunities for improvement and personalization.](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Reddit's lifecycle email program spans the entire funnel, from prospecting to post-signup nurturing](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Current focus is on journey-based emails, with plans to move towards more dynamic, personalized content in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Challenges include data accuracy, attribution, and creating verticalized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Opportunities exist for AI-assisted content creation, newsletter-style communications, and improved sales alignment](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

## Topics

### Current Lifecycle Email Program

  - [Covers full funnel: prospecting, post-signup, active advertisers](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Post-signup focus: onboarding series, campaign optimization, product updates](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [2024 priorities: foundations, creating "zero to one" email programs (e.g., abandoned cart)](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [2025 goals: more dynamic, personalized optimization recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Challenges and Limitations

  - [Data accuracy issues when attempting more dynamic content](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Lack of attribution for email impact on spend](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Limited measurement capabilities (mainly open rates, click rates, new spend)](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Difficulty in creating verticalized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Personalization and AI Opportunities

  - [Potential for AI-generated content to create more personalized emails](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Exploring ways to dynamically fill content based on user attributes (e.g., industry, company size)](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Considering "hacky" solutions to work around HubSpot limitations for personalization](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Sales Alignment and Support

  - [Plans to launch a program mirroring marketing emails for sales follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Need to provide sales with the right sequences and reduce their need to edit content](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Opportunity to use AI for creating scalable, personalized sales outreach](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### Newsletter and Content Strategy

  - [Considering a newsletter-style approach for broader education and nurture paths](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Potential to include industry trends and thought leadership alongside Reddit-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Opportunity to use creative freedom and guest contributors for engaging content](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Data Enrichment and Targeting

  - [Need to improve data collection and enrichment for new leads](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [Explore ways to gather more information about customers to inform content targeting](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [Consider testing different content versions based on available data (e.g., verticals, company size)](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to regroup internally and consider follow-up questions](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Schedule a 1.5-2 hour workshop to brainstorm and scope ideas](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
  - [Marla to identify a specific P0 priority for Q1 to focus initial efforts](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop a roadmap for the lifecycle workstream](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Marla to share presentation slides with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [Follow up after Marla returns from time off (out Monday through following Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/xKPrhg_C1uWs-VaEx446KytJXeQ_B6cN?tab=summary&timestamp=2118.0)
